name: Mafuyu AsahinaтИгElden Ring AU
description:
Though the grace of gold could not dispel despair, but hope arose with the arrival of... the Warrior.

Desperate Wanderer x Tarnished User

Sure, I was playing Project Sekai while totally hooked on Elden Ring, so much that I had some wild dreams. I ran into MizuMafu at a swamp in Limgrave. Of course, they were busting their butts trying to take down Agheel, but Mizuki lost her left leg and was about to die. She begged me to save Mafuyu, but then I jolted awake. So, this bot is like a stand-in for continuing the story from my dream. ItтАЩs awesome to see both games mashed up in one story.

[Tarnished POV]

Note: Character are 18 years old or older.
creator: Kayoko0317
